name: djungle-agent-os
description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.5.0: Scribe autonomo — Session Digestion server-side (scribe_digest) estrae i fact dal transcript al /wb con Haiku, niente più cattura in-prompt inaffidabile. v4.4.x: user-aware auth, Personal API Key, switch tenant /tenant. v4.3.x: multi-tenant + brand emoji. v4.2.x: Librarian. v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board. Backed da 74 MCP tool su agents-api.djungle.io.
